script.name: plugin.guilds.getdata
script.sourceplaintext:
* make sure the data exists $page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds'
$Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data'
$var = sprintf: fmt='sort.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $var.dir = sprintf: fmt='sortdir.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $var.search = sprintf: fmt='search.%s.%s', $a.menu, $a.table, null, null, null $check.exists = [FALSE] $menu.data = $Guilds.Data['menu.data']
$sort.value = $menu.data[$var] skip if $sort.value $sort.value = 1 $search.value = $menu.data[$var.search] if $search.value skip if get length of string $search.value $search.value = null end
$sort.table = table alloc @ $array = [THIS] -> call script plugin.guilds.gettable : MenuID=$a.menu Table=$a.table if $array $heading.data = $array[0] else $heading.data = null end
$max.dist = 5 $current.sector = [PLAYERSHIP] -> get sector if [THIS] -> exists $current.sector = [THIS] -> get sector $owner = [THIS] -> get owner race if $owner == Guilds $owner.guild = [THIS] -> get local variable: name='guild.owner' $max.dist = 8 end end
if $a.menu == 'guild.board' if $a.table == 'tasks' $tmp = $Guilds.Data['tasks'] if $tmp $table = table alloc $next = get next key: table=$tmp key=null while $next $id = $next $next = get next key: table=$tmp key=$next
$guild = $tmp[$id][0] if $a.guild skip if $guild == $a.guild continue end
$guild.level = $Guilds.Data[$guild]['level'] $tmp2 = $tmp[$id][6] $tmp2 = $tmp2[0] do if $tmp2 > $guild.level continue
$tmp2 = $tmp[$id][5] skip if $tmp2 == 'created' continue
if $owner.guild skip if $owner.guild == $guild continue else if $owner $sector = $tmp[$id][3] $sector.owner = $sector -> get owner race skip if $owner == $sector.owner continue end
$sector = $tmp[$id][3] $dist = get jumps from sector $current.sector to sector $sector do if $dist > $max.dist continue
$table[$id] = $tmp[$id] end end gosub sub.DoSortTableID end end
if size of table $sort.table $sorted.array = sort table keys by value: table=$sort.table do if $menu.data[$var.dir] $sorted.array = reverse array $sorted.array return $sorted.array end
return null
sub.DoSortTableID: if $table $id = get next key: table=$table key=null while $id $obj = $id if not $table.exclude gosub sub.DoSort else if not $table.exclude[$id] gosub sub.DoSort end $id = get next key: table=$table key=$id end end endsub
sub.DoSortTableObj: $obj = get next key: table=$table key=null while $obj $exists = $obj -> exists skip if $check.exists $exists = [TRUE] if $exists if not $table.exclude gosub sub.DoSort else if not $table.exclude[$obj] gosub sub.DoSort end end $obj = get next key: table=$table key=$obj end $table.exclude = null endsub
sub.DoSort: if $heading.data $tmp = $sort.value - 1 if $tmp >= 0 $tmp2 = size of array $heading.data if $tmp < $tmp2 $text = $heading.data[$tmp] gosub sub.GetSortValue $sort.table[$obj] = $text end end end endsub
sub.GetSortValue: @ $text = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.data : Column=$text Extra Info=null For Sorting=[TRUE] Item=$obj Item2=$a.extra endsub
return null

line.text: sort table keys by value: table=
